update_note: Code anchors migrated to v0.2 stack per ADR-005. Legacy src paths marked (archived).

relevant_files.evidence: (archived v0.1) ScenarioModel was a single authored flow; active state used selectedNodeId/activeStepId. Replaced by src/App.tsx wireframe in v0.2.
v0.2 wireframe using static SCENARIOS array + useState<ScenarioId>; form-driven shape per ADR-006, pending data layer for RecommendationResult.
Command catalog, workflow paths, and categories.
Lifecycle, scoring, routing, preconditions, and close-call behavior.

patterns: Current UI is data-driven but single-path.
Recommendation logic must be separated from React rendering.
Sharing/gallery expands beyond static-only local persistence.
